hits.q: ABC created what company as a production company in response to fin-syn rules?
hits.extr: fcc imposed its rules in 1970 , abc created two companies worldvision enterprises as syndication distributor , and abc circle films as production company . however , between the publication and implementation of these regulations , the separation of the catalog was made in 1973 . the broadcast rights to productions were transferred to worldvision .

hits.gold: the capacity of the Tyne Tunnel
hits.extr: renumbered , with many city centre roads changing from to their present numbers . in november 2011 the capacity of the tyne tunnel was increased when project to build second road tunnel and refurbish .

hits.q: How many types of movements do euplokamis tentilla have?
hits.extr: cell type otherwise unknown in the phylum ctenophora and they are coiled when relaxed , while the tentilla of all other known ctenophores elongate when relaxed . tentilla have three types of movement that are used in capturing prey they may flick out very quickly in 40 to 60 milliseconds they can wriggle , which may lure prey by behaving like small planktonic worms and they coil round prey . the unique flicking is an movement powered by contraction .

hits.q: What molecule does the Sun have in higher proportion than Earth?
hits.extr: crashed genesis spacecraft has shown that the sun has higher proportion of oxygen-16 than does the earth . the measurement implies that an unknown process depleted oxygen-16 from the sun's disk of protoplanetary material prior to the of dust grains .

hits.q: How many times did plague occur in Venice?
hits.extr: 1350 to 1490 . plague epidemics ravaged london in 1563 , 1593 , 1603 , 1625 , 1636 , and 1665 , reducing its population by 10 to 30 during those years . over 10 of population died in , and again in , 1655 , and 1664 . plague occurred in venice 22 times between and 1528 . the plague of killed 50,000 in venice , almost third of the population . late outbreaks .

hits.q: How many broadcast television partners does the NFL have?
hits.extr: televised by cbs , as part of cycle between the three main broadcast television partners of the nfl . the lead broadcast team of jim and phil simms called the contest , with tracy wolfson and evan washburn on the sidelines . cbs introduced new features during the telecast , including pylon cameras and microphones along with array of 36 cameras along the upper deck .

miss_wrong_span.q: What was Isiah Bowman nick name, as known by the public.
miss_wrong_span.extr: bird migration routes have been studied by variety of techniques including the oldest , marking . swans have been marked with nick on the beak since about 1560 in england . scientific ringing was pioneered by hans christian cornelius mortensen in 1899 . other techniques include radar and satellite tracking .

miss_wrong_span.q: What did Lindzen criticize about the Summary for Policymakers?
miss_wrong_span.gold: does not faithfully summarize the full WGI report
miss_wrong_span.extr: summary of the summary for policymakers report says they are certain that emissions resulting from human activities are substantially increasing the atmospheric concentrations of the greenhouse gases , resulting on average in an additional warming of the earth's surface . they calculate with confidence that co2 has been responsible for over half the enhanced greenhouse effect . they predict that under business as usual scenario , global mean temperature will increase by about 0.3 per decade .

miss_wrong_span.q: What offers a conceptual definition of force?
miss_wrong_span.extr: subscribed to notion of philosophy as the conceptual clarification of the methods , insights and discoveries of the sciences . they saw in the logical symbolism elaborated by and bertrand russell powerful instrument that could rationally reconstruct all scientific discourse into an ideal , logically perfect , language that would be free of the ambiguities and of natural language . this gave rise to what they saw as metaphysical and other conceptual . by combining thesis .
